title: ADDICTIONS/DEPENDENCIES SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: CHANCE CORVALLIS ADDICTIONS/DEPENDENCIES SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support, guidance, and resources to help those in recovery. Services offered include relapse prevention groups (Alcoholics Anonymous, Gamblers Anonymous, and Narcotics Anonymous). 456 SW Monroe Avenue Suite 108 Corvallis, OR 973335412 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies, call for current schedule Email (541) 224-2750 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 224-2750 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Support Groups Anger Management Drug Use Disorder Support Groups Smoking/Vaping Cessation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHANCE CORVALLIS
